titles.title: Great Is the Lord and Most Worthy of Praise

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Great is the Lord and most worthy of praise The city of our God, the holy place The joy of the whole earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Great is the Lord in whom we have the victory He aids us against the enemy We bow down on our knees

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And Lord, we want to lift Your name on high And Lord, we want to thank You For the works You've done in our lives And Lord, we trust in Your unfailing love For You alone are God eternal Throughout earth and heaven above
